hero.headline: When your pipes won't *cooperate*

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every pipe, drain, and fixture
services_section.subheading: Standard plumbing repairs and installations handled right

services.title: Leak Repair
services.description: From dripping faucets to burst pipes. We find the source and fix it properly the first time.

services.title: Water Heater Service
services.description: Installation, repair, and replacement of all water heater types. Hot water when you need it.

services.title: Drain Cleaning
services.description: Clogged sinks, tubs, and main lines cleared with professional equipment.

services.title: Fixture Installation
services.description: New sinks, toilets, garbage disposals, and bathroom fixtures installed correctly.

about.heading: Real techs, real trucks, real answers
about.body: We're a Valdosta plumbing team that shows up when we say we will. One call, one team, one bill.

reviews.name: Gaozhoua P.
reviews.text: Very good, efficient and professional. Within the hour the two technicians came out to replace our water heater.

reviews.name: Randall H.
reviews.text: Amazed when told they would have a technician at my house in 30 minutes! Very friendly and professional, price was reasonable.

reviews.name: Mary P.
reviews.text: Matt and Cole know what they're doing and are quick to make changes if needed. Fair pricing and upfront quotes.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving South Georgia
service_areas.subheading: Fast response across Lowndes County and surrounding areas

cta.heading: Ready to fix what's broken?
cta.body: Licensed plumbers standing by. Free estimates on all work.
